# About Us
* [Home](https://avempace-wireless.com)

// what we offer
## Your Partner for
Software Innovation
Avempace is a trusted partner of several entreprises and Medium Size Companies with established partnerships. We help businesses elevate their value through custom software development, product design, QA and consultancy services.
_**We can help to maintain and modernize your IT infrastructure and solve various infrastructure-specific issues a business may face.**_

// An nearshore location for high added value designs
## Improve and Innovate
with a highly qualified team
We hire and build your own remote dedicated development teams tailored to your project needs. Based in Tunisia, Avempace provides access to highly qualified engineering ressources and brings a proven expertise in multi-component systems development.
Web and mobile development 85%
IoT systems design 90%
Embedded software and Electronics 95%
![](https://avempace-wireless.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/Tunis.png)
##### We answer your inquiries within one business day !
Have an IoT project, an inquiry about system architecture, IoT services, our global presence, cooperation model or costs ?
Get accurate answers from our team and talk to our technical experts. Packages available from few consultation hours to large scale projects !
[](https://avempace-wireless.com/index.php/contacts/) [ CONTACT US](https://avempace-wireless.com/index.php/contacts/)
